title: Surfaces, Draw Order, Alpha, Transforms, Assets, and Presentation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed playtest review reconstructs surfaces, draw order, alpha, transforms, assets, and presentation from revision, seed, input frames, simulation snapshots, draw records, audio cues, accessibility settings, profiles, package artifacts, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for owned layered rendering and asset pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Distinguish display and off-screen surfaces, pixel formats, per-surface and per-pixel alpha, color keys, locks, and conversion timing.
Define clear, background, world, effects, HUD, focus, diagnostics, and presentation order once per frame.
Rotate and scale from an immutable source, recenter output bounds, cache justified variants, and avoid cumulative degradation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Surface Model
steps.instruction:

content.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 2896 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Build deterministic Python evidence to compose draw order, surfaces, alpha, asset conversion, transforms, and one explicit frame presentation; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish display and off-screen surfaces, pixel formats, per-surface and per-pixel alpha, color keys, locks, and conversion timing.

stimulus.title: Render Alternatives case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 3053 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to compose draw order, surfaces, alpha, asset conversion, transforms, and one explicit frame presentation; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Make ship, hazard, projectile, focus, damage, and status distinguishable without color alone and under reduced effects.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A neon palette is readable and accessible by default.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Make ship, hazard, projectile, focus, damage, and status distinguishable without color alone and under reduced effects. Artifact under review: owned layered rendering and asset pipeline.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Render Alternatives, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Render Alternatives: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Asteroids team handles case 1434 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to compose draw order, surfaces, alpha, asset conversion, transforms, and one explicit frame presentation; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Make ship, hazard, projectile, focus, damage, and status distinguishable without color alone and under reduced effects.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives, keep Render Alternatives connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Make ship, hazard, projectile, focus, damage, and status distinguishable without color alone and under reduced effects.

hints: For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives, name the player, revision, runtime, seed, input, time, coordinate, state, entity, collision, render, cue, accessibility, package, release, and desktop-transfer boundary, Render Alternatives precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives, trace this concrete input and predict event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, accessibility, failure, pause, rollback, recovery, and desktop evidence before reviewing it: A review Asteroids team handles case 1434 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to compose draw order, surfaces, alpha, asset conversion, transforms, and one explicit frame presentation; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Make ship, hazard, projectile, focus, damage, and status distinguishable without color alone and under reduced effects.

For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Render Alternatives, challenge the documented misconception with changed-frame-rate, stall, seam, input, device, collision, cue, accessibility, save, package, failure, recovery, and controlled desktop-transfer evidence: A neon palette is readable and accessible by default.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The decision applies Surface Model to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Surface Model.

checks.description: The decision applies Draw Layers to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Draw Layers.

checks.description: The decision applies Transform Source to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Transform Source.

checks.description: The decision applies Asset Admission to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Asset Admission.

checks.description: The decision applies Render Alternatives to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Render Alternatives.

checks.description: The decision applies Render Alternatives to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Render Alternatives.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using make and ship plus specific case evidence.
